summary: Completed testing of Markets News tab bug fix and second superadmin (walidhalabi@hotmail.com) implementation. All tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: Login both superadmins (douglas + walid) with correct credentials
Backend: Both superadmins have role=superadmin, plan=investor
Backend: Both superadmins have 'portfolio' and 'backtest' features
Backend: Both superadmins can access /api/portfolio (200, not 403)
Backend: Both superadmins can access /api/backtest?ticker=AAPL (200, not 403)
Frontend: Markets News tab loads without errors (bug fix verified)
Frontend: News tab displays 20 news cards correctly
Frontend: Tab switching works (gainers → news → crypto → news) without errors
Frontend: Walid has Admin link visible in sidebar
Frontend: Douglas still has admin access (regression passed)
